message:
fix(ru-client): correct agent-sweep CLI argument format

Update sweepPhase1 and sweepPhase2 methods to use correct ru CLI arguments:

- Change --phase1/--phase2 to --phase 1/--phase 2 (separate arg and value)
- Add --timeout flag to pass timeout value to the CLI subprocess
- This ensures the ru process itself enforces the timeout, not just the
  client-side wait

The ru agent-sweep command expects "--phase N" format, not "--phaseN".
Also, passing the timeout to the CLI allows it to handle long-running
operations (like waiting for agent completion) more gracefully.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
